name: Delegation Kanban Board Builder
description: Builds a deterministic delegation_board_snapshot from worker_task_packet, worker_result_package, and worker_merge_review_package records so long-running delegated work can be inspected as a Kanban-style board.

inputSchema.name: Worker Task Packets
inputSchema.description: List of worker_task_packet records to project onto cards.

inputSchema.name: Worker Merge Review Package
inputSchema.description: Optional parent worker_merge_review_package with workers, risk flags, retry attempts, and budget review.

outputSchema.name: Delegation Board Snapshot
outputSchema.description: Kanban-style board snapshot with columns, cards, counts, source refs, and next actions.

outputSchema.name: Kanban Board Report
outputSchema.description: Short human-readable report for run details and output nodes.
